title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su presents five foundational rules for effective Claude Cowork setup and workspace management, covering memory structure, file organization, and project migration. He argues that most users get the foundation wrong without guidance and shares practices learned from three months of running a business on Cowork.
